issue_draft.title: Rate Limiting for Login Endpoint
issue_draft.problem_description: The current implementation of the login endpoint does not have rate limiting in place, which could lead to brute-force attacks and abuse. Implementing rate limiting will help prevent these issues.
issue_draft.evidence: No rate limiting is currently implemented on the /login endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: The login endpoint will enforce a maximum of 5 requests per minute from a single IP address.
The login endpoint will return a 429 Too Many Requests error after reaching the rate limit.
The rate limiting will be reset after 15 minutes.
issue_draft.instruction: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
